completed_steps.summary: Classified Pack-Manager as a monolith with one desktop application part
Inventoried 10 existing documentation and workflow files; user requested no additional focus areas
Tech stack identified as Tauri 2.11.5 and Rust 2021 with React 19.2.8 and TypeScript 5.8.3

project_classification.primary_technology: Tauri 2 desktop application with a React 19 and TypeScript interface and a Rust native core
project_classification.architecture_summary: Single bundled application with React and Rust layers connected through local Tauri IPC and events

pack-manager.native_core: Rust 2021 with Tokio 1.53.1, Serde, tracing, and Tauri plugins
pack-manager.interface: React 19.2.8 with TypeScript 5.8.3, Vite 7.3.6, and Tailwind CSS 4.3.3
pack-manager.state: Zustand 5.0.14 in the interface and managed AppState in Rust
pack-manager.testing: Vitest 4.1.10 with Testing Library and Rust cargo tests
pack-manager.architecture_pattern: Component-based React interface connected to a command- and event-driven native core through typed local Tauri IPC
